idea: build a chatbot for new employee to ask question about the company
guideline: Adhere to the Acme Product Studio values of fast iteration and simple MVP scope. The chatbot must leverage the preferred tech stack of Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind, ensuring clear ownership by assigned team members within the 8-week constraint.

timeline.deliverable: Functional requirements document and data source selection
Core chatbot interface and backend integration
User acceptance testing report and final release build
